items.title: After Venezuela Earthquakes, Deportees from the U.S. Are Missing or Found Dead
items.summary: Many of the 146 Venezuelans deported from the United States the day the earthquake struck are feared dead.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: At least five killed in fire at Antwerp apartment building, say police
items.summary: The fire broke out in the 10-storey block in the Linkeroever district of the Belgian city.

items.title: Andhra Pradesh Information Commission dismisses 160 RTI cases, raps appellant over misuse
items.summary: The Commission said Naidu Nagarjuna Reddy had filed thousands of applications and over 400 second appeals, using the RTI Act as a litigation tool rather than for transparency
